headline: Barclays Reiterates Overweight Rating on Entergy Corp. (ETR)
summary: Entergy Corp. (NYSE:ETR) is one of the 11 best regulated electric stocks to buy now. On June 3, Barclays reduced the price target on Entergy Corp. (NYSE:ETR) from $124 to $119. The firm retained an Overweight rating on the stock. As per the firm, the stock performance has been lackluster since the first quarter’s report, […]
